skills.name: Memoria persistente
skills.description: Gestiona memoria global, runtime memory y contexto persistente.

skills.name: Control de escritorio
skills.description: Automatización local de mouse, teclado, ventanas y archivos.

skills.name: Visión contextual
skills.description: Resumen visual, pistas de acción y guía heurística de pantalla.

skills.name: Correo Gmail
skills.description: Envío de correo, adjuntos y preparación de archivos recientes.

skills.name: Auto-mejora supervisada
skills.description: Análisis, propuesta, validación y aplicación local de mejoras.

tools.name: generate_cad_prototype
tools.description: Generates a 3D wireframe prototype based on a user's description. Use this when the user asks to visualize or prototype something in 3D.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Writes content to a file at the specified path. Overwrites if exists.

tools.name: read_directory
tools.description: Lists the contents of a directory.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Reads the content of a file.

tools.name: create_word_document
tools.description: Creates a Word .docx document on the PC.

tools.name: create_excel_workbook
tools.description: Creates an Excel .xlsx workbook on the PC.

tools.name: create_powerpoint_presentation
tools.description: Creates a PowerPoint .pptx presentation on the PC.

tools.name: capture_screen_snapshot
tools.description: Captures a screenshot of the current screen.

tools.name: observe_system_state
tools.description: Inspects the current desktop state, active window, open windows and browser context.

tools.name: move_mouse
tools.description: Moves the mouse cursor to screen coordinates.

tools.name: click_mouse
tools.description: Executes a mouse click, optionally at coordinates.

tools.name: type_text
tools.description: Types text into the active window.

tools.name: press_hotkey
tools.description: Presses a keyboard shortcut in the active window.

tools.name: scroll_desktop
tools.description: Scrolls in the active window.

tools.name: open_url
tools.description: Opens a URL in the default browser.

tools.name: focus_window
tools.description: Focuses a desktop window by title, process or pid.

tools.name: close_window
tools.description: Closes a desktop window by title, process or pid.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Sends an email using the configured Gmail account.

tools.name: shutdown_pc
tools.description: Schedules a PC shutdown. Use only when explicitly requested.

tools.name: create_custom_script
tools.description: Creates a reusable custom Python script for ADA.

tools.name: run_custom_script
tools.description: Runs a registered custom script.

tools.name: list_custom_scripts
tools.description: Lists registered custom scripts.

tools.name: list_bluetooth_devices
tools.description: Lists Bluetooth adapters and known, paired or connected devices.

tools.name: set_bluetooth_power
tools.description: Starts or stops the Windows Bluetooth service.

tools.name: open_bluetooth_settings
tools.description: Opens Windows Bluetooth settings.

tools.name: spotify_playback
tools.description: Controls Spotify or the active media session: open, play, pause, toggle, next or previous.

tools.name: spotify_search_and_play
tools.description: Opens Spotify, searches a song/artist/playlist and attempts to start playback.

tools.name: resolve_visual_target
tools.description: Finds a visible UI/text target on screen using OCR and UI detection.

tools.name: click_visual_target
tools.description: Resolves a visual target by OCR/UI and clicks it.

tools.name: type_into_visual_target
tools.description: Resolves a visual target, focuses it and types text.

tools.name: visual_compound_action
tools.description: Resolve a visual target and act on it, optionally retrying with scroll if it is not found at first.

tools.name: run_visual_playbook
tools.description: Ejecuta una estrategia de playbook visual específica para la app activa (Spotify, Edge, Settings, Explorer, Discord). Detecta la app, aplica heurísticas de región y sugiere siguiente acción.

tools.name: read_system_clipboard
tools.description: Reads the current system clipboard text. Useful when the user has copied something and ADA needs to know what is on the clipboard.

tools.name: manage_automation_rules
tools.description: List, add, remove or toggle automation rules that react to system events (window changes, clipboard, time). Use to create rules that run automatically based on what happens on the PC.
